title: Weekend SaaS Challenge
hook: I built a SaaS in one weekend. It's already making money.
voiceoverScript: I built a SaaS in one weekend. It's already making money. The idea? A simple tool that turns meeting notes into action items. Friday night, I scaffolded with Claude Code. Saturday, I added Whisper transcription and Claude summarization. Sunday morning, I deployed on Vercel with Stripe payments. Sunday afternoon, I posted on Reddit. By Monday, four people had paid ten dollars each. It's not a million-dollar business. But it proves you can go from zero to revenue in forty-eight hours. The tools exist. The playbook works. You just have to start. Would you try this? Drop a comment if you'd build this.

scenes.label: Meeting Notes → Action Items
scenes.text: AI-powered meeting summarizer built in one weekend.

scenes.label: 48-Hour Build
scenes.text: Friday scaffold → Saturday AI → Sunday deploy + payments
